title: terebinthus tomentosa
intro: Terebinthus tomentosa, also known as the woolly tree or woolly white turpentine bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Terebinthus tomentosa include relief from respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
